PAYMENTS STRUCTURED OVER PERIOD BETWEEN 19 OCT 99 AND 1 JUL 00. DEFAULT JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT JOSEPH CALAVETTA FOR POSSESSION ONLY.
